title: Settings Dashboard

statement.markdown:
## Settings Dashboard Challenge

Create a settings dashboard that allows users to toggle night mode and change the accent color. The dashboard should have a responsive design and adapt to varying screen sizes.

### Requirements
1. The dashboard should have a dark and light mode toggle.
2. The accent color should be changeable via a color picker.
3. The dashboard should be responsive and work on varying screen sizes.
4. The design should be modern and visually appealing.

constraints: Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
Keep the HTML structure as simple as possible.
Use a CSS variable for the accent color.
Test the dashboard on various screen sizes.

starterCode.html: Settings Dashboard
